titleStmt.title: SII 16.90: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 90. (A.R. No. 181 of 1913.) GŌRAṆṬLA, HINDUPUR TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the maṇḍapa in the Mādhavarāyasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1446, Tāraṇa, Kārtika śu. 12, Monday, Utthānadvādaśi, Chitrā-nakshatra, regularly corresponding to 1524 A.D., November 7, f.d.t. °05.
Much damaged. It registers that the agent of Vākiṭi Ādepa-nāyaḍu granted land to the Vishṇu (Perumāḷ) temple at Gōraṇṭla for maintaining festive processions on the daśami days every month.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakhavaruṣaṁbulu 1446 Agunēṭi tāraṇa saṁvatsara
kā¨rtika śu 12 sō śrīman®mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī tirumala dēvarāya mahārāyalu
pruthvīrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍagānu vākiṭi Ādepanāyanigāri kā¨ryyaka¨rttalayina [Ātrēya gō]
traṁ rukśākhādhyāyulayina gāru gōraṁṭla pērumāḷla daśamula śēvaku yiccina bhūdānadha¨rmaśāsanaṁ gōraṁṭla perumāḷlaku naṁbu pūja
dēśamulu kā¨rtika ba 10 Ārabhyaṁ jēṣṭha ba
kaḍalōni nayivēdyānaku biyyaṁ
Utsava vākiṭi Ādepanāyaniki mātaṁḍri rāma
rasu gōraṁṭla rāvikuṁṭavenaka karaṇaṁ tiṁmaya cēstimi nīru staḷāṁ maḍi canape re
ḍigāri maḍi rōla yiddumunu dīṁni Utthānadvādasi puṁṇyakālamaṁdu citrānakṣatiramaṁdu Aśvaddhanārā
yaṇa saṁnidhini mā svāmi Ādepanāyani mā taṁḍri rāmarasu gārikinni puṁṇyamu gānu gōraṁṭla perumāḷla daśamula Utsāhānaku dhāra
perumāḷlanaṁbula tiṁmaya Aṁnaya nāgaya dha¨rmaya gāru mīru mīpu The rest of the record is very much
Digital edition of SII 16.90 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
